languages.text: "Остатки экспонатов, собранных мной в этом звездном регионе, однако не распределенных по другим экспозициям. Когда-нибудь надо найти возможность заняться ими... хотя значимость этого отделения столь мала, что целесообразность такого времяпрепровождения для меня крайне сомнительна".

traits.locale_text: "Остатки экспонатов, собранных мной в этом звездном регионе, однако не распределенных по другим экспозициям. Когда-нибудь надо найти возможность заняться ими... хотя значимость этого отделения столь мала, что целесообразность такого времяпрепровождения для меня крайне сомнительна".

languages.text: "The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."
languages.original_text: "Остатки экспонатов, собранных мной в этом звездном регионе, однако не распределенных по другим экспозициям. Когда-нибудь надо найти возможность заняться ими... хотя значимость этого отделения столь мала, что целесообразность такого времяпрепровождения для меня крайне сомнительна".

traits.locale_text: "The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."

"The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."

"The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."

languages.text: “这些都是我在这个恒星区域获得的展品残片，还没来得及归入其他展厅。我得找个时间处理一下……不过，这部分展区实在是无足轻重，我严重怀疑这项工作能有多大价值。”
languages.original_text: "The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."

traits.locale_text: “这些都是我在这个恒星区域获得的展品残片，还没来得及归入其他展厅。我得找个时间处理一下……不过，这部分展区实在是无足轻重，我严重怀疑这项工作能有多大价值。”

languages.text: «Los restos de piezas obtenidas en esta región que aún no he distribuido entre las otras exposiciones. Algún día encontraré el momento de organizarlos... aunque el significado de esta sección es tan irrelevante como para considerar cuestionable la utilidad de la tarea».
languages.original_text: "The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."

traits.locale_text: «Los restos de piezas obtenidas en esta región que aún no he distribuido entre las otras exposiciones. Algún día encontraré el momento de organizarlos... aunque el significado de esta sección es tan irrelevante como para considerar cuestionable la utilidad de la tarea».

languages.text: « Voici les pièces acquises dans cette région stellaire qui n'ont pas encore trouvé leur place dans l'exposition. Il faudrait que je me décide un jour à les organiser... bien que ces objets soient d'une importance tellement mineure que le bien-fondé de cette tâche me semble douteux. »
languages.original_text: "The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."

traits.locale_text: « Voici les pièces acquises dans cette région stellaire qui n'ont pas encore trouvé leur place dans l'exposition. Il faudrait que je me décide un jour à les organiser... bien que ces objets soient d'une importance tellement mineure que le bien-fondé de cette tâche me semble douteux. »

languages.text: "Bu yıldız bölgesinden edindiğim ancak diğer sergiler arasına dağıtılmamış eserlerin kalıntıları. Bir ara onlarla ilgilenmeye vakit ayırmalıyım... Gerçi bu bölümün önemi o kadar az ki böyle bir işin faydasını son derece şüpheli buluyorum."
languages.original_text: "The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."

traits.locale_text: "Bu yıldız bölgesinden edindiğim ancak diğer sergiler arasına dağıtılmamış eserlerin kalıntıları. Bir ara onlarla ilgilenmeye vakit ayırmalıyım... Gerçi bu bölümün önemi o kadar az ki böyle bir işin faydasını son derece şüpheli buluyorum."

languages.text: "Die Überreste von Exponaten, die ich in dieser Sternregion erworben, aber den anderen Stücken noch nicht hinzugefügt habe. Eines Tages muss ich mich mit ihnen befassen ... wobei die Signifikanz dieser Abteilung so gering ist, dass ich den Nutzen einer solchen Tätigkeit ausgesprochen fragwürdig finde."
languages.original_text: "The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."

traits.locale_text: "Die Überreste von Exponaten, die ich in dieser Sternregion erworben, aber den anderen Stücken noch nicht hinzugefügt habe. Eines Tages muss ich mich mit ihnen befassen ... wobei die Signifikanz dieser Abteilung so gering ist, dass ich den Nutzen einer solchen Tätigkeit ausgesprochen fragwürdig finde."

languages.text: 「この星雲で手に入れた展示品の一部。他の展示に配分されなかったもの。いつか整理する機会を...でもこのコーナーは重要性が低いので、整理する意味は疑問に思う。」
languages.original_text: "The remnants of exhibits I acquired in this stellar region, but which have not been distributed among the other displays. Some day I must find an opportunity to deal with them... although the significance of this section is so minor that I find the usefulness of such a task to be highly questionable."

traits.locale_text: 「この星雲で手に入れた展示品の一部。他の展示に配分されなかったもの。いつか整理する機会を...でもこのコーナーは重要性が低いので、整理する意味は疑問に思う。」
